titles.text: まじかる☆タルるートくん FANTASTIC WORLD!!

descriptions.text: Fifth grader Edojou Honmaru is one of the most trodden-upon losers in his class, until he meets Magical Taluluto-kun. Taluluto's powers help him deal with all his hardships, such as girls, bullies, and numerous other challenges.

Honmaru Edojo gets into an argument with Jaba Jabao, the class leader.
His homeroom teacher, Mr. Ohaya, asks him to fight outside.
